message:
Command `
# New data! 
# DRT-0267: cpu_time=18m38s, elapsed=5:35, memory=1135MB (growing from ~1135MB)
# This is the GUIDE READING phase (same as step 69's original run)!
# DRT3 is now past groups and reading guides - much faster progress!
# The pipe drain is working perfectly.
# 
# 19m55s CPU / ~6.7min elapsed. Reading guides.
# After guide reading: track assignment, data prep, then 0th iteration.
# 0th iteration starts at ~5-6min elapsed.
# 
# Monitor more frequently now - we're approaching routing iterations!

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 120  # 2-minute intervals
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] EXITED!" && break
    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt3_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -3 /tmp/drt3_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^$" | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-120)
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    DRT72=$(ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | grep odb | awk '{print $5}')
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B DRT=$DRT72 FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$STEP | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
` executed with exit code -1.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "
# New data! 
# DRT-0267: cpu_time=18m38s, elapsed=5:35, memory=1135MB (growing from ~1135MB)
# This is the GUIDE READING phase (same as step 69's original run)!
# DRT3 is now past groups and reading guides - much faster progress!
# The pipe drain is working perfectly.

# 
# Monitor more frequently now - we're approaching routing iterations!

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do

    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] EXITED!" && break
    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt3_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -3 /tmp/drt3_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^$" | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-120)
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    DRT72=$(ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | grep odb | awk '{print $5}')
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B DRT=$DRT72 FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$STEP | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
" timed out
